# Project Instructions for GitHub Copilot

This is a Next.js application with JavaScript and Tailwind CSS.

## Project Structure

- `/src/app`: Contains pages and components using the App Router
- `/public`: Static files like images
- `/src/components`: Reusable components (consider creating this folder)
- `/src/styles`: CSS and styling modules (if needed beyond Tailwind)

## Development Guidelines

- Follow JavaScript best practices
- Use functional components with hooks for React components
- Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling
- Prefer server components when possible
- Consider accessibility in all UI components
